fields.description: The process step this mapping belongs to — matches IPD Fabric Process.sequence. Keys the mapping to its sibling process row.
fields.label: Sequence

fields.description: Groups attribute entries into one logical mapping (a combination transition). Enables multi-attribute (multi_swap) rows.
fields.label: Mapping Index

fields.description: Which attribute this entry concerns (Dia, Colour, ...).
fields.label: Attribute

fields.description: Change = value swap (from set, to set). Introduce = new attribute (to set, from blank; output side only). Pin = passthrough (from set narrows; blank = wildcard, expand to all). Consume = consumed attribute (from set, to blank; input side only — the mirror of Introduce).
fields.label: Role

fields.description: Change: pre-value. Pin: the pinned value (blank = wildcard). Consume: the consumed value (required, never wildcard). Introduce: blank.
fields.label: From Value

fields.description: Change/Introduce: post-value. Pin: equals from_value (builder mirrors from). Consume: blank.
fields.label: To Value
